name: Ravi
competitive_goal: Perform well at Masters-level Opens and Quarterfinals. Not chasing Games.

current_1rms.notes: Most 1RMs not formally tested. Last heavy C&J attempt 75+ kg Mar 24 2026.

current_benchmarks.notes: To be tested during Week 3 of current 3-week block.

priority_gaps.label: Strict HSPU to 2-inch riser
priority_gaps.why: Masters 55-59 QF4 standard, biggest gap vs kip HSPU focus

priority_gaps.label: Zone 2 and threshold intervals
priority_gaps.why: Engine is undertrained for 26.1-style long pieces

priority_gaps.label: Programmed deload every 4 weeks
priority_gaps.why: At 57, tendon adaptation lags muscle adaptation

programming_notes: Training 6 days = 4 hard + 2 intentionally light (skill/Zone 2) + 1 rest
Track joint warm-up time as overtraining canary
Ring MU and HSW deprioritized — not featured prominently at Masters 55-59
